approvedAdvisories.reason: Reviewed on 2026-04-04 for ASE-40. The only remaining shipped high-severity advisory is lodash-es@4.17.21 through mermaid@11.11.0; keep it explicit in the gate output, but do not cut the first trusted release until the production graph no longer resolves lodash-es < 4.18.0.
approvedAdvisories.reviewBy: remove before the first trusted release by upgrading the mermaid/lodash-es chain

approvedPackages.reason: Reviewed on 2026-04-04 for ASE-40. `pnpm licenses list --json --prod` still reports `Unknown`, but the khroma@2.1.0 npm tarball ships `package/license` with MIT text, so keep a package-specific metadata exception until the published package declares SPDX metadata.
